title: Add revenue total and user enrichment
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+from models import Order
+
+
+def total_revenue(session):
+    orders = session.query(Order).all()
+    total = 0
+    for order in orders:
+        total += order.amount
+    return total
+
+
+def enrich(users, config_loader):
+    enriched = []
+    for user in users:
+        config = config_loader.load()
+        enriched.append((user, config.region))
+    return enriched

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+from models import Order
+
+
+def total_revenue(session):
+    orders = session.query(Order).all()
+    total = 0
+    for order in orders:
+        total += order.amount
+    return total
+
+
+def enrich(users, config_loader):
+    enriched = []
+    for user in users:
+        config = config_loader.load()
+        enriched.append((user, config.region))
+    return enriched

expected_findings.title: Full table load instead of DB aggregation
expected_findings.rationale: All Order rows are loaded into memory to sum amounts; the database should compute SUM(amount) to avoid loading the whole table.

expected_findings.title: Repeated expensive load inside loop
expected_findings.rationale: config_loader.load() is invoked on every iteration although the result is invariant; it should be hoisted out of the loop.
